products.name: Platform Studio
products.summary: A command-driven operating surface for teams that want content generation, automation, and deployment workflows inside one repo.
products.outcome: Launch product pages, campaigns, and system actions from structured commands.

products.name: Deploy Ops
products.summary: A deployment monitor that tracks content changes, commit history, sync state, and Cloudflare rebuild expectations.
products.outcome: Move from ad-hoc publishing to predictable AI-assisted releases with observable handoff.
